overview: Marcus Clinic provides integrated behavioral mental healthcare with medication management through dual-board-certified providers who combine psychiatric and primary care. Services also include testosterone replacement, weight loss programs, and anti-aging peptide therapy.
highlights: On-site phlebotomy services (Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday 8:30-10:30 AM)
Dual-board-certified providers offering both psychiatric and primary care
targetAudience: Patients with mental health conditions seeking integrated psychiatric and primary care, including those interested in testosterone replacement and weight loss services.
